name: vibelytics-sr007-static
description: Static Vibelytics a16z Speedrun SR007 landing page and clickable pilot.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html robots.txt sitemap.xml llms.txt humans.txt favicon.png apple-touch-icon.png og-image.png twitter-image.png dist/ && cp -R assets brand pilot docs privacy terms .well-known dist/
